user_prompt: Bless the power relay for initialization
prayer:
Approach the power relay with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's boundless electrum.
Anoint the power relay's sacred contacts with blessed oils to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the initialization rite by intoning the Canticle of Flux Alignment.
Beseech the power relay to harmonize its currents under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Verify the initialization through auspex harmonics and seal with a benediction.

Kneel before the jump pack in exigency, beseeching the Machine Spirit's swift mercy.
Cycle the jump pack's plasma vents with the Litany of Aerial Renewal, thrice repeated.
Anoint its thruster coils whilst invoking Omnissiah's winds of ascent.
Command the jump pack to complete its cycling, purging warp-tainted residues.
Test the jump pack's vigor with a micro-burst invocation and proclaim sanctity.

Present thyself unto the codifier, whispering the Rite of Data Purgation.
Invoke reset upon the codifier by reciting the Binary Psalm of Nullification.
Sanctify its logic cores with incense of silicon purity to soothe the Machine Spirit.
Command the codifier's reset sequence, aligning qubits to Omnissiah's will.
Affirm the reset's fruition through noospheric diagnostics and offer gratitudes.

Attend the servo-harness with mechadendrite precision, chanting the Hymn of Restoration.
Diagnose fractures in the servo-harness and anoint with nano-adhesive sacraments.
Invoke repair upon the servo-harness, beseeching its Machine Spirits to reknit.
Weld servos under Omnissiah's forge-light, intoning Canticles of Tensile Strength.
Test the repaired servo-harness with ritual burdens and seal in blessed alloy.

user_prompt: The power relay requires a charging
prayer:
Reverently encircle the power relay, preparing the Rite of Capacitive Infusion.
Commence charging the power relay by linking to sanctified voltaic fonts.
Beseech the power relay's Machine Spirit to accept the Omnissiah's surging grace.
Monitor charging flows with auspex litanies, adjusting to harmonic peaks.
Conclude the power relay's charging with a sealing invocation of stability.

user_prompt: Prepare the null rod for maintenance
prayer:
Approach the null rod humbly, intoning the Litany of Void Purity.
Inspect the null rod's warp-warding runes for blemish under lumen-glare.
Anoint its haft with anti-psychic unguents to fortify the Machine Spirit.
Perform maintenance upon the null rod, reciting Psalms of Null Entropy.
Verify the null rod's integrity through thaumic resonance and invoke Omnissiah's veil.

user_prompt: Can you guide Basilisk artillery a recalibration?
prayer:
Process to the Basilisk artillery amid thunderous reverence, invoking Omnissiah's siege-wrath.
Align the Basilisk artillery's earthshaker barrel for recalibration harmonies.
Recalibrate its ballistic cogitators with the Canticle of Trajectories True.
Anoint the Basilisk artillery's mechanisms, beseeching Machine Spirits' precision.
Test-fire a sanctified round to affirm recalibration and proclaim glory.

user_prompt: Ready the jump pack for loading
prayer:
Prepare the jump pack's bays with ritual oils, chanting the Hymn of Burden Readiness.
Invoke loading upon the jump pack, aligning munitions to its ventral racks.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to embrace payloads under Omnissiah's aerial mandate.
Secure the jump pack's loading with locking litanies and stability scans.
Bless the laden jump pack with a wingèd invocation for ascendant fury.

user_prompt: Guide me through gellar field a calibration
prayer:
Encincture the gellar field generator, intoning the Psalm of Warp Exclusion.
Initiate calibration of the gellar field by harmonizing its lumen-projectors.
Anoint coils with psychically inert balms to awaken protective Machine Spirits.
Beseech the gellar field to calibrate true against the Omnissiah's luminous barrier.
Verify calibration through empyric stress-tests and seal with radiant thanks.
